Everyone must speak in a cartoon voice for {rule_turns} rounds. Normal voice = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: Cartoon voices are done. You sound normal again... mostly.

prompts.text: No saying any Disney character names for {rule_turns} rounds. Slip up = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: Disney names are back on the table.

prompts.text: {player1} is the Animation Director. Everyone must ask them for permission before drinking for {rule_turns} rounds. Skip the ask = extra sip.
prompts.rule_end_text: {player1} has been fired as Director. Drink freely.

prompts.text: Before drinking, you must name an animated movie. Can't? Extra 2 sips. Lasts {rule_turns} rounds.
prompts.rule_end_text: No more pre-drink movie names required. Freedom.

prompts.text: Everyone must refer to each other by animated character names for {rule_turns} rounds. Real names = 2 sips.
No one can say the word 'movie' for {rule_turns} rounds. Say it = 2 sips.
{player1} is the Critic. They rate every answer from 1-10 for {rule_turns} rounds. Under 5 = take a sip.
prompts.rule_end_text: {player1} is no longer the Critic. Their review career is over.

prompts.text: Anytime someone mentions a Disney movie for the next {rule_turns} rounds, everyone else takes 1 sip.
Every time you drink for the next {rule_turns} rounds, you must quote an animated movie first. Can't? Double the sips.
{player1} picks an animated character. For {rule_turns} rounds, anyone who doesn't know that character takes 1 extra sip when drinking.
No pointing for {rule_turns} rounds. If you point, take 2 sips.
Everyone must do a villain laugh before drinking for {rule_turns} rounds. Skip it = extra sip.
prompts.rule_end_text: Villain laughs are done. The heroes won.

prompts.text: {player1} is Thumbmaster. When they put their thumb on the table, last to notice takes 2 sips. {rule_turns} rounds.
No one can say the word 'drink' for {rule_turns} rounds. Slip up = 2 sips.
For {rule_turns} rounds, everyone must hold their drink with their non-dominant hand. Wrong hand = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: Drink with whatever hand you want now.

prompts.text: Everyone must end their sentences with 'said no Disney princess ever' for {rule_turns} rounds. Forget = 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: You don't have to be a Disney princess anymore.

prompts.text: {player1} picks a word. For {rule_turns} rounds, whoever says that word takes 2 sips.
prompts.rule_end_text: {player1}'s banned word is no longer banned.

prompts.text: For {rule_turns} rounds, you must whisper when speaking. Full voice = 2 sips.
Everyone must do jazz hands when answering for {rule_turns} rounds. No jazz hands = 1 sip.
For {rule_turns} rounds, when you take sips you must make a cartoon sound effect. Silence = extra sip.
